title: viburnum plicatum f. mariesii
intro: Viburnum plicatum f. mariesii, also known as the Koreanspice viburnum, is a deciduous shrub native to East Asia, characterized by its white, lacecap flowers and red berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, with properties that include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Viburnum plicatum f. mariesii include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and aiding in the treatment of various health conditions such as fever and rheumatism. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
